findings.title: Admin DTO date serialization inconsistency
findings.problem: Several admin DTOs expose Date objects instead of Timestamp (ISO string).
acceptanceCriteria: Outbound admin DTO date fields use Timestamp/string, not Date
Fetcher mappers convert Date values with toISOString()
pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, pnpm test pass

findings.title: Catalog manager row DTO is oversized
findings.problem: WrapManagerRowDTO inherits detail-level fields not needed for manager table payloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Manager list uses purpose-specific DTO (no detail inheritance)
Fetcher select only includes manager-needed fields
Manager result DTO updated to focused type

findings.title: Optional vs nullable semantics are mixed
findings.problem: Some contracts mix field?: T | null patterns where domain intent is unclear.
acceptanceCriteria: Input contracts prefer optional fields for partial writes
Output DTOs prefer explicit nullable fields where absence is meaningful
No ambiguous mixed nullable+optional fields without documented intent

findings.title: Admin DTO string literal unions should use shared status constants/types
findings.problem: Some admin contracts define status/action unions inline instead of shared constants/types.
acceptanceCriteria: Status/action domains are centralized in shared constants/types
Admin DTOs reference shared status types

findings.title: Dead or redundant type aliases increase cognitive load
findings.problem: Audit identified aliases/redundant DTO wrappers that do not add semantic value.
acceptanceCriteria: Unused aliases removed or explicitly documented as compatibility shims
